case_title: ALEXEI A. PEREZ APARICIO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,745.00 FILED BY PEREZ APARICIO, ALEXEI A. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED FEB-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALEXEI PEREZ APARICIO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTEPRETER NINA SAFDIE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLA GREEN CLAIM ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ APARICIO, ALEXEI A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,423.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,473.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
